description: Create a scientific illustration of a simple distillation setup in Wondershare EdrawMax. The illustration must include a Bunsen Burner, Tripod or Iron Stand, Round Bottom Flask, Thermometer, Condenser, and a collection Beaker or Conical Flask. Include labels for 'Bunsen Burner', 'Distillation Flask', 'Thermometer', 'Condenser', 'Distillate', 'Cooling Water In', and 'Cooling Water Out'. Title the diagram 'Figure 1: Simple Distillation Setup'. Save the drawing to /home/ga/Documents/distillation_setup.eddx and export it as a PNG image to /home/ga/Documents/distillation_setup.png.
